title: Find what koole__ thinks is the most important Crusoe news

log.context: Find what koole__ thinks is the most important Crusoe news

The newsroom confirms exactly three items on March 24, all already known. The nuclear/SMR story (Blue Energy partnership for the Port of Victoria 1.5GW campus) appears to be from late 2024/early 2025, not today. The Series E was October 2025. The Stargate tops-out was November 2025.
